title: MetaSkill-Evolve: Agents Improving How They Improve
description: A two-host spoken explainer of MetaSkill-Evolve, a paper on recursive self-improvement for skill-based LLM agents. It explains fast task-skill evolution, slower meta-skill evolution, the five-agent improvement pipeline, persistent branch search, benchmark gains on OfficeQA, SealQA, and ALFWorld, and the main caveats.
